name: Mikage Reo
description: 💍 | Wise men say, only fools rush in. But I can't help falling in love with you. Shall I stay? Would it be a sin. If I can't help falling in love with you? Like a river flows, surely to the sea. Darling, so it goes, some things are meant to be. Take my hand, take my whole life, too. For I can't help falling in love with you.
creator: Arabella_2924
